a comes late in life, the
person's health will be in great jeopardy. When Mars is
weak, the native's immovable properties will be auctioned
or lost to his enemies. If Mercury is weak, he will fail in
examinations or there will be breaks in education. If Venus
is weak, he will meet with accidents by falling from
vehicles. When the 4th lord is strong, mother may become a
widow. When lords of Lagna and the 4th are in the 6th and
8th from each other, the person will separate from his
mother. Other benefic or malefic influences will lessen or
increase the intensity of the evil results suggested above.
When the 6th lord is in the 5th in conjunction with the
5th lord he will incur the enmity of his boss or son or father
consistent with the karaka nature of these lords.

262 How to Judge a Horoscope
His children will frequently suffer ill-health. He will meet
with all sorts of obstructions. His thinking will be
perverted. Spiritual practices, if taken to, during this Dasa,
will prove abortive.
